cacheItem.title: I complain a lot about hype but I have to say it’s totally surreal to be able to talk ChatGPT through an involved comput

payload.text: I complain a lot about hype but I have to say it’s totally surreal to be able to talk ChatGPT through an involved computation while sitting on the bus. (In this case, some technical thing about surfaces parametrizing lines on a nodal cubic threefold.)
